scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,api,listener,processor,alerts,web -c gray,blue,cyan,magenta,yellow,green "npm run dev -w @token-monitor/shared" "npm run dev -w @token-monitor/backend" "npm run dev -w @token-monitor/chain-listener" "npm run dev -w @token-monitor/event-processor" "npm run dev -w @token-monitor/alert-worker" "npm run dev -w @token-monitor/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @token-monitor/shared && npm run build -w @token-monitor/backend && npm run build -w @token-monitor/chain-listener && npm run build -w @token-monitor/event-processor && npm run build -w @token-monitor/alert-worker && npm run build -w @token-monitor/frontend
scripts.lint:unused: npm run lint:unused -w @token-monitor/shared && npm run lint:unused -w @token-monitor/frontend
scripts.ci: npm run lint:unused && npm run knip && npm run build
